The text "Würzburg, Rechts- u. staatswiss. Diss. v. 23. Dez. 1913" confirms it's a dissertation from Würzburg, defended Dec 23, 1913. The publication is the printed version in Marburg. The bibliographic entry usually refers to the printed version.
